description: Excellent High Tier software. Does exactly what we need and more. Allows reliable log and SIEM monitoring for security and compliance with custom options including retention. Feature requests are taken into consideration most of the time. Support is outstanding.
author: Asaf N.
pros: Installation and setup was very fast. It's very reliable and runs smoothly on the server. Support team is super responsive, attentive and extremely professional. The first setup is easy with excellent guidance from the team over the phone and/or remote support. UI is very easy to navigate after a short period of time.
cons: Missing custom range filtering by date for logs.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It has really be helpful in dealing with compliance requirements.
author: Brendan T.
pros: It's a solid product that delivers as promised, and adds a whole new layer of security to my network. I would highly recommend it for people needing log management for compliance.
cons: It is a little complex so configuring takes a bit of time, but even right out of the box it's useable.

description: It seems to provide some alerting, but setup is difficult.
author: Randy O.
pros: General log monitoring. Product pricing was good.
cons: The interface is not intuitive. Searching is difficult. Support is non-existent.

author: Giorgos S.
pros: While it is simple to navigate, it has a lot of features, though we use it mainly for Log Consolidation as it offers us a lot of options for reading the logs and what to extract and store, as well as the ability to use actions to basically do almost anything when a specific condition is met and filter conditions are very easy to set.
cons: We faced a few minor issues but support has been great.

review_title: Excellent Product with first class support
description: I've had some issues in the past when deploying or updating the product and reached out to the support team for assistance and it really is a unique selling point of this product to be able to speak to [sensitive content hidden] (the developer) who not only knows the product back to front but is also dynamically adding in new features when he sees things that are worth improving. This gives me assurance about the product and future working with Cornerbowl.
author: John H.
pros: The application is easy to setup and configure and does what it says on the tin. In comparison to other suppliers on the market the product is very competitive on pricing and the platform is regularly updated.
cons: There are some product quirks like any software however these dont affect the general functionality of the product.

review_title: Best Value in Monitoring & Log Managment
description: I have only scratched the surface of what I can do with this software. While initially looking for a low-cost replacement for our previous tool that was primarily used for AD user account monitoring (e.g., new accounts created, privilege escalation, etc.) and some basic auditing of activity on network shares, I found this tool that can do those things and so much more. It can do everything from basic alerts on server free disk space to helping discover & troubleshoot network issues using the syslog server and everything in-between and beyond. The documentation is thorough and accurate. There are also numerous YouTube videos available to help get things configured. The developer's passion for this software is evident, as he's eager to assist with any issues. I look forward to finding more ways to expand my company's usage of CBSM.
author: Nathan R.
pros: The flexibility and extensibility of this software is amazing. The ability to easily monitor and receive alerts on so many diverse machines (basically anything that produces any type of a log - even text files in the filesystem) through one tool makes this a great fit for SMBs, but it's also evident that it can scale to enterprise infrastructure as well.
cons: It takes a little time to get a firm understanding of how the software works. Although you can get it installed and monitoring/collecting logs from a single server in ~10 minutes, you will want to spend some time learning how to properly configure your database to suit your environment and how to customize your templates. The documentation and tutorials on the website cover all of this and more.

review_title: Great SIEM / Monitoring / Log collection / Alerting solution
author: Karim R.
pros: It's an all-in-one solution! Cornerbowl provides supports us with Regulatory and Alerting.
cons: Currently testing with SQLlite. There is a possibility that we may have to move to MS SQL, which we'll need a license for.

description: We have used Cornerbowl for several years. Once configured it just works. It is great to see regular updates and the product continuing to improve. The FAQ information is well laid out, has relevant documentation and videos. It is a quality product.
author: Bob J.
pros: Several things: 1. The product works as intended. 2.) Response from vendor/support. 3.) Quite flexible in its ability to work with many types of logs and workflow. 4.) Excellent documentation with video and screenshots.
cons: Would like to see the ability to track/documents investigations. Link AD and M365 accounts, using SID.

review_title: Corner Bowl Server Manager for the win
description: The software does what it is supposed to do. Any time I need help with a configuration or just have something simple to tackle, support is there and happy to help.
author: Barry B.
pros: This question should state, "What DO you like..." Corner Bowl Server Manager keeps getting better and better. What else is there to say?
cons: I have absolutely no cons with this software.

author: Preston H.
pros: Easy to install, has regular updates for any issues that need to be fixed. Their support is also top notch.
cons: Can be somewhat complex to setup, but they have great documentation and youtube videos, and their support can usually answer any questions you have.

review_title: A great product to manage business needs
author: Syed A.
pros: I would say about the email alerts integrated with multiple agents associated with various templates. Real-time alerts really help to manage business efficiently.
cons: Sometimes, some features don't work after upgrades which is okay and the support is really awesome to get it resolved.

review_title: Easy and affordable excellent reporting and retention.
description: I've been using this for about 10 years and have never regretted the decision.
author: Charles C.
pros: Customer support is super. Very responsive always extra information.
cons: Can't think of any downside to the product, they do their best to keep things up to date and running smooth.

review_title: Server Manager - Easy to deploy with a wide amount of functions
description: The software is easy to set up, use, and is helpful in reporting and alerting. Support has also been outstanding and new features are continually being added.
author: David H.
pros: The built in templates make reporting and alerting easy to set up. Once you have your alerts in place, the software is very low maintenance.
cons: There are so many ways this software can be used, and some of the advanced features are difficult to understand for usage.

author: Christina B.
pros: Offers numerous set up and filter choices.
cons: Help feature is inadequate. Online help/training presentations, information is baseline adequate, but too high level at times. Software is not user friendly if you are NOT well versed in IT/OIT activities.

author: Mansoor S.
pros: The software is very good and quick to alert us if they are any issues.
cons: I do not think there is anything we least like about the software

review_title: Best Log Aggregation software for the cost
description: Nice little gem of a tool to use for companies that don't want to spend more on logging software than the actual applications and systems that need to be monitored.
author: John Y.
pros: Can perform AD security auditing and alerting. Windows Update alerting. Syslog alerting
cons: Can not increase syslog queue. Some log configurations are more difficult than it should be. Clean up of old items is needed.

author: Jon L.
pros: Ease of setup and configuration is smooth. User interface is simple to navigate and adjust settings as needed.
cons: Software struggles when more than 200 end devices are added. Despite adding additional CPU/memory the software will lag when making configuration changes and sometimes enter a state of "not responding"

author: Bassem G.
pros: It contains a lot of features and templates of logs , Also it Simple, Light, and Easy to use
cons: I didn;t face any issue yet ,It works fine with me

description: We have used Corner Bowl for the past decade and find it to be world class.
author: Allen S.
pros: Ability to customize the output and notifications
cons: The licensing can be complicated and when it expires we seem to always have down time.

review_title: Like having an extra IT person on staff
description: Feature packed, personalized and prompt customer support, value pricing, all adds up to a great product.
author: Tony B.
pros: We probably only use a fraction of the functionality, but that speaks to the large feature set. It's a product composed of many feature groups. Each time we have new monitoring requirement for Windows servers, we've found a solution via Cornerbowl. We initially used it to monitor services, moved into event log monitoring, syslog files, website uptime monitoring, and now also use it for IISlogs and text log files.
cons: For some functionality, there is a learning curve, but since the developer is readily available for assistance, we've been able to configure the desired functionality, or the developer has made changes to the product to accommodate our needs.

review_title: Great software with excellent customer support
description: [SENSITIVE CONTENT] from CornerBowl is awesome! He is extremely attentive and does everything in his power to help his users get the software set up the way they need it.
author: Manning P.
pros: The ability to actively capture logs from multiple servers into one location makes backing up logs much simpler
cons: There is some lag in loading the logs when you select a machine. Sometimes it makes it seem like its not working.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Lorenzo Z.
pros: I love this product because is very easy to use and the pricing is really competitive.
cons: I didn't like really much the querying system, sometimes it isn't easy to use.

author: Shane B.
pros: The reports of the audits are very straight to the point. The software unlike SPLUNK is extremely easy to setup and manage, which cuts time down while running audits.
cons: Nothing so far. We love the software, if there were cons we would not have considered the software.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Mehul P.
pros: Easy to use, reliable and great support,
cons: Nothing bad about this product. Grat support so can't complain.

author: Jeremy L.
pros: This is a very easy program to use and manage. It fills a gap that some other more expensive software doesn't cover. The support I have received from [sensitive content hidden] is top notch!
cons: None, the few problems that I have had, were resolved quickly.
